page_metadata.biotools__summary: Hidden Markov Model based tool that is developed to detect histone modification in cancer ChIP-seq data. It applies three correction steps to the data: copy number correction, GC bias correction and noise level correction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Hidden Markov Model based tool that is developed to detect histone modification in cancer ChIP-seq data. It applies three correction steps to the data: copy number correction, GC bias correction and noise level correction.
